data.title: The Empire State Building To Celebrate Its 95th Anniversary With a Sweet New Pop-Up Experience From Ghirardelli
data.description: In NYC, the Empire State Building will collaborate with Ghirardelli Chocolate Company to introduce a special 95th anniversary pop-up on the 86th Floor Observation Deck from April 10 to May 10. Known for their delightful treats, Ghirardelli Chocolate & Ice Cream Shop will offer the exclusive Kong Sundae as part of the celebration. This limited-time partnership will give visitors a unique experience at one of NYC's top attractions.

data.title: ArkBio Completed Dosing of First Cohort in Australian Phase I Trial of Antiviral Drug-Fc Conjugate Drug AK0406
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Shanghai Ark Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. revealed that the initial group of healthy volunteers has received doses in the phase I clinical trial of AK0406. This drug is a new long-acting antiviral drug-Fc conjugate (ADFC) designed to combat influenza.

data.title: LG ELECTRONICS UNVEILS NEW FULL BUILT-IN KITCHEN SUITE AT EUROCUCINA 2026
data.description: LG Electronics is set to introduce its latest kitchen appliance package, "LG Built-in," at EuroCucina 2026. The lineup includes refrigerators, ovens, and induction cooktops. This integrated six-category lineup is crafted for efficiency, space optimization, and AI-driven performance. The package aims to offer a comprehensive solution for modern kitchens. With multiple appliances in the lineup, LG aims to cater to various needs of consumers. The unveiling of this new product range signifies LG's commitment to innovation and meeting consumer demands.
